name: IGO Limited
description: IGO Limited is an ASX-listed exploration and mining company focused on discovering, developing, and operating assets that are critical to clean energy. Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, the company's portfolio includes high-quality nickel, copper, and cobalt operations, as well as a significant interest in the world-class Greenbushes Lithium Mine. IGO is committed to sustainable development and delivering key metals that enable the global transition to a low-carbon future.
